title: × orbelia barklyi
intro: × Orbelia barklyi, also known as the 'Barkly's Orbelia' or 'Orbelia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to South Africa. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, including asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of × Orbelia barklyi include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often used to relieve coughs and congestion.
